## Skill checklist (for new skills)

- [ ] Folder name is lowercase with hyphens (e.g. `my-skill-name`)
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, category, agents, tags, author)
- [ ] Skill has a clear, specific use case
- [ ] At least one named agent environment in `agents:` list
- [ ] Includes at least one real input → output example
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing skill
- [ ] Tested with the named agent environment(s)
